case_title: NUMME, GREG vs. YOURIEV, BENKO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NUMME, GREG AS TO DEFENDANT YOURIEV, BENKO MARIN DOOR TO DOOR DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-29-1999 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-30-1998 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JAN-11-1999
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-05-1999 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-03-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY DENNIS ROBERTS, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-18-1999 CONTINUED FROM MAR-03-1999 TO APR-07-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-07-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-07-1999, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT AND OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY DENNIS ROBERTS, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-22-1999 CONTINUED FROM APR-07-1999 TO MAY-19-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF NUMME, GREG
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-29-1999, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, OSC TO PLTF'S ATTORNEY DENNIS ROBERTS HEARING SET FOR MAR-03-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-05-1999, OFF CALENDAR JAN 5,1999 POS OSC.

OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-19-1999, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $300.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON MAY-19-1999, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY DENNIS ROBERTS, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUN-03-1999 CONTINUED FROM MAY-19-1999 TO JUL-07-1999 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
SANCTIONS IMPOSED ON 5-20-99 ARE VACATED. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED ON 5-19-99.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
